title: King Gia Long Building the Country
summary: The first King of the Nguyen Dynasty who unified the territory and built monumental works.

slides.text: Did you know? King Gia Long was the person who had a great merit in joining our S-shaped land from Lang Son to Ca Mau.
slides.imagePrompt: Map of Vietnam with a golden thread connecting the north and south, King Gia Long holding a compass, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: He built solid dike systems to protect the people's fields from floods. He was also very interested in trade.
slides.imagePrompt: People building a strong stone dike by a river, green fields, a bustling river market, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: In particular, King Gia Long drafted the 'Hoang Viet luat le' (The Imperial Code of Vietnam) to maintain discipline and order for the country after many years of war.
slides.imagePrompt: A large ancient legal book, an official reading a scroll to a crowd, atmosphere of law and order, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: During his reign, Vietnam's territory was expanded and its sovereignty firmly affirmed, especially in the sacred sea and island areas such as Hoang Sa and Truong Sa.
slides.imagePrompt: King Gia Long standing on a cliff by the sea, looking at the islands in the distance, ancient navy boats, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What was the greatest merit of King Gia Long?
Where did he choose as the capital of the Nguyen Dynasty?
